stage_cap_policy: One SINGLE $15 cap applies across ALL capability-preflight attempts of every kind (aborted, ambiguous, successful, past or future) for this stage, regardless of how many separate execution identities, manifests, or per-attempt ledger directories/ledger_ids are used to pursue it. A fresh per-attempt ledger directory (e.g. each of E:/selvarath-archive/capability_preflight_23060e5e08ca2b0c_live-aborted/, E:/selvarath-archive/capability-preflight-r2/, and whatever r3 uses) starts its OWN ledger_id and its own local event chain, but NONE of those per-attempt ledgers resets or refreshes this stage-family cap. The stage-family cap is tracked here, external to and above every per-attempt ledger.

attempts.accounted_spend_usd_note: Locally adjudicated zero charge: the archived TypeError was raised by Python argument binding strictly before the SDK's transport entry point, independently reproduced with two no-network traps (see the bound closure's trap_test).

components.spend_usd_basis: adjudicated upper bound = reserved per-transmission cost 0.00738601 x 3 maximum possible SDK-internal transmissions (ledger reserved/unknown_charge event_hashes 0e21c0cfa9471aa531e6fc41656de7c8c19a1133f469a664d346dc1e46f8b7dd / a6f176fe8479bd6f24ec3e0c2b4691b79278b31e910c883ab999656bfe48fa8b)

carried_forward_accounted_spend_usd_deri: qwen actual 0.00107328 + gemma adjudicated upper bound 0.02215803 = 0.02323131 (Decimal-exact; sums attempts[*].accounted_spend_usd across every attempt in this family to date)

carryforward_completion_credit.note: The qwen call carried forward by rejudge/phase2_preflight_carryforward_2026-07-19.json counts as 1 of the 1,060 planned capability-preflight logical cells without being re-run; r3 must plan for at most 1,059 fresh provider calls (1,058 ordinary cells plus 1 replacement call for the closed-ambiguous gemma cell) against the 14.97676869 remaining cap.

cap_never_reset_by_fresh_ledger_note: Each attempt above used its own fresh per-attempt ledger_id and ledger directory (46d90ea8ce21475a87a54258566790ac under E:/selvarath-archive/capability_preflight_23060e5e08ca2b0c_live-aborted/; 80832328bf0d474e8a402747b07f4c0b under E:/selvarath-archive/capability-preflight-r2/). Neither fresh ledger_id, nor any future r3 ledger_id, ever resets stage_cap_usd or zeroes carried_forward_accounted_spend_usd; this stage-family ledger is the single authority for cumulative capability-preflight accounting across every attempt, and any r3 manifest must bind THIS artifact (by canonical_sha256) as its available-cap source rather than re-deriving it from only its own attempt's ledger.

provider_reconciliation_cross_check.note: The same-day dashboard delta ($0.01) is consistent with, but too coarse (cent rounding) to independently confirm or refute, the 0.02323131 accounted here; per that reconciliation artifact's own r2_attempt_reconciliation.disposition, the gemma upper bound is retained in this stage-family ledger rather than reduced to a rounding-implied lower figure.

note: Accounting record only; grants no execution authority. Any capability-preflight execution manifest (r3 or later) must bind this artifact's canonical_sha256 and treat r3_available_cap_usd, not stage_cap_usd, as its true remaining budget.
